flags.description: Master toggle. Off = every write path in the region module returns 503. Emergency-only — flips down when the identity-service must freeze Region mutations (e.g. mid-migration or during a compliance-motivated freeze).

Off = `region.resolve_active` middleware accepts a paused Region on booking-adjacent routes with a warning header instead of a 409. Emergency-only — used when a bad pause has been applied + rolling it back is faster than un-pausing per-tenant.
Off = ReconcileDefaultRegionInvariantJob no-ops. Used during scheduled migrations that intentionally leave tenants in a temporary invariant-violating state.

Independent of `region.reconciliation.auto_heal` config — when this flag is off, no auto-heal happens even if the config is on. Two layers of guard because auto-heal changes financial-attribution behaviour + must never surprise ops.
Off = PurgeArchivedRegionsJob no-ops. Archived Regions sit past their 730-day retention window. Rare — used during legal holds when Region-scoped financial evidence must be preserved.
Off = PATCH /{region}/tax-config returns 503. Used during month-end / year-end financial close when tax_config must remain stable.
Off = POST /{region}/set-default returns 503. Used during scheduled invoice runs when the default region must not flip mid-batch.

Master gate for the `region_time_travel` entitlement's write path. Off (default) = retroactive tax_config replays are silently deferred even when the tenant is entitled. Turns on with Wave 3 when the finance replay pipeline lands.

Off = SeedDefaultRegionForTenantJob runs synchronously inside the tenancy provisioning transaction. Slower but safer (tenant is never briefly regionless). On is the default because tenant onboarding must feel instant.
